# Issue 066: Rename `props` to `params` in Atom constructor

**File:** `packages/core/src/Atom.ts`

**Request:** Rename constructor parameter from `props` to `params`.

**Current:**
```ts
constructor(props: AtomicParameters) {
  this.name = props.name;
  this.symbol = props.symbol;
  // ...
}
```

**Expected:**
```ts
constructor(params: AtomicParameters) {
  this.name = params.name;
  this.symbol = params.symbol;
  // ...
}
```

**Reason:** `props` is React/UI component terminology. For a chemical entity like `Atom`, `params` (parameters) is the appropriate term — it describes the physical and chemical parameters defining an atomic species.
